The GC743 DC132 ST00BP00 well was drilled and completed as a Cased Hole Dual Zone Frac Packed Single-Selective well.  The M55 and M57 sands were both completed and individually frac packed for sand control.  The completion allows for the selective downhole choking or isolation of the lower interval and upper intervals through the installation of the choking downhole flow control system.  When the rig moved off the well, the upper interval (M57) DHFC sleeve was left open and the lower interval (M55) DHFC sleeve was left closed.
